name: aipu
description: Aipu Electronics is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing and sales of power modules, with products covering DC-DC power modules, AC-DC power modules, and isolated transceiver modules.
longDescription: Aipu Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China. It is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing and sales of power modules. The company has a strong R&D team and advanced production equipment, with products widely used in industrial control, communication equipment, power systems, instrumentation, medical equipment and other fields. Aipu's product line includes DC-DC power modules (fixed input, wide input, non-isolated series), AC-DC power modules, isolated transceiver modules (CAN, RS-485, RS-232), etc. The company has passed ISO9001 quality management system certification, and products comply with UL, CE, RoHS and other international certification standards. As a leading enterprise in China's power module industry, Aipu Electronics has won the trust of many customers with high-quality, cost-effective products. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo provides comprehensive technical support for Aipu products, including product selection, application design, sample evaluation and supply chain services.
seoTitle: Aipu Electronics - Professional Power Module Manufacturer | BeiLuo Distributor
seoDescription: Aipu Electronics professional power module supplier, providing DC-DC, AC-DC power modules and isolated transceivers. High-quality, cost-effective domestic power solutions.

faqs.question: What are Aipu's main products?
faqs.answer: Aipu's main products include: 1) DC-DC power module series: fixed input series (such as A05 series), wide input series (such as B05 series), non-isolated series (such as E05 series), with power range from 0.25W to 60W; 2) AC-DC power module series: power range from 5W to 150W, supporting various input voltage ranges; 3) Isolated transceiver module series: including CAN bus isolated transceivers (such as CTM series), RS-485 isolated transceivers (such as RSM series), RS-232 isolated transceivers. All products have industrial-grade reliability and comply with UL, CE and other international certification standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select the appropriate product series based on your application requirements (input voltage, output power, isolation requirements). Contact our FAE team for selection advice.

faqs.question: How does Aipu ensure power module quality?
faqs.answer: Aipu Electronics ensures product quality through a comprehensive quality management system: 1) Raw material control: All raw materials come from qualified suppliers and undergo strict incoming inspection; 2) Production process control: Automated production lines are used, with 100% inspection of key processes; 3) Finished product testing: Each product undergoes rigorous electrical performance testing, aging testing and environmental adaptability testing; 4) Certification system: The company has passed ISO9001 quality management system certification, and products have obtained UL, CE, RoHS and other international certifications; 5) Reliability guarantee: Product MTBF exceeds 1 million hours, with 3-year quality guarantee. In addition, Aipu Electronics has a CNAS-accredited laboratory with comprehensive product testing capabilities.
faqs.decisionGuide: Aipu power modules have industrial-grade reliability and are suitable for applications with high quality requirements. Request quality certification documents and reliability reports.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of Aipu power modules compared to imported brands?
faqs.answer: Aipu power modules have the following advantages compared to imported brands: 1) Price advantage: Under the same performance, the price is usually 30-50% lower than imported brands, significantly reducing system costs; 2) Short delivery cycle: Domestic production, standard products in stock, customized products delivery in 2-4 weeks; 3) Timely technical support: Local FAE team provides fast-response technical support; 4) Customization services: Customized solutions can be provided according to customer needs; 5) Quality assurance: Industrial-grade reliability, MTBF exceeds 1 million hours; 6) Supply chain security: Domestic alternative, avoiding import restriction risks. In terms of performance, Aipu power modules' efficiency, ripple, temperature characteristics and other indicators have reached international advanced levels.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive projects requiring fast delivery, Aipu power modules are the ideal choice. Contact our FAE team for product comparison evaluation.

faqs.question: How to select the appropriate Aipu power module?
faqs.answer: Selecting Aipu power modules requires considering the following factors: 1) Input voltage: Determine the input voltage range and choose fixed input (such as 5V, 12V, 24V) or wide input (such as 4:1 wide voltage range); 2) Output voltage and power: Select output voltage (such as 3.3V, 5V, 12V, 15V, 24V, etc.) and power level according to load requirements; 3) Isolation requirements: Determine whether input-output isolation is needed and the isolation voltage level (such as 1500VDC, 3000VDC); 4) Package form: Select SIP, DIP, SMD and other packages according to PCB space; 5) Operating temperature: Confirm the application environment temperature and choose commercial grade (0~70°C) or industrial grade (-40~85°C); 6) Special functions: such as short circuit protection, overcurrent protection, remote switch control, etc. Use our online selection tool or contact the FAE team for professional advice.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use Aipu selection guide or contact our FAE team, provide your application requirements to get the best product recommendation.

faqs.question: What are the application fields of Aipu power modules?
faqs.answer: Aipu power modules are widely used in the following fields: 1) Industrial automation: PLC, frequency converters, industrial controllers, sensor power supply; 2) Communication equipment: Base stations, routers, switches, optical communication equipment; 3) Power systems: Relay protection devices, power monitoring equipment, smart meters; 4) Instrumentation: Test and measurement equipment, analytical instruments, medical equipment; 5) Rail transit: Signal systems, on-board equipment, platform equipment; 6) New energy: Photovoltaic inverters, energy storage systems, charging piles; 7) Security monitoring: Cameras, DVRs, access control systems; 8) Internet of Things: Smart gateways, sensor nodes, wireless communication modules. Aipu power modules have been widely used in these fields due to their high reliability and cost performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: No matter which field your application belongs to, we can provide suitable power solutions. Contact our FAE team to discuss your specific application.

faqs.question: What technical support services does Aipu provide?
faqs.answer: Aipu Electronics provides comprehensive technical support services through BeiLuo: 1) Product selection: Recommend the most suitable product model according to customer application needs; 2) Application design: Provide reference circuit design, PCB layout suggestions, EMC design guidance; 3) Sample support: Provide free samples for testing and verification; 4) Technical training: Regularly hold product technical training and seminars; 5) Failure analysis: Assist customers in analyzing and solving problems encountered in applications; 6) Custom development: Provide customized product solutions according to special needs; 7) Documentation support: Provide detailed datasheets, application notes, reliability reports and other technical documents. Our FAE team has rich power design experience and can provide customers with professional and timely technical support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Make full use of our technical support services to accelerate your design process. Contact our FAE team for technical support.

faqs.question: What is the delivery cycle of Aipu power modules?
faqs.answer: The delivery cycle of Aipu power modules is as follows: 1) Standard products in stock: Common models maintain inventory and can be shipped immediately; 2) Standard products order: Standard products without inventory, delivery in 2-4 weeks; 3) Customized products: According to customization content, delivery in 4-8 weeks; 4) Large quantity orders: Orders exceeding 10,000 units, delivery time needs to be negotiated specifically. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo maintains inventory of common models to meet customers' urgent needs. For long-term cooperative customers, we can provide VMI (Vendor Managed Inventory) services to ensure timely supply. It is recommended to confirm the delivery time in advance during the project planning stage, especially for products with special requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent needs, contact our sales team to confirm inventory status. For bulk orders, it is recommended to place orders 4-8 weeks in advance.

faqs.question: How to obtain Aipu product technical documents and samples?
faqs.answer: Ways to obtain Aipu product technical documents and samples: 1) Official website: Visit Aipu Electronics official website to download datasheets, application notes and other technical documents; 2) BeiLuo website: View Aipu brand zone on our website to get product information and documents; 3) Contact sales: Call our sales hotline or send email to request documents; 4) Sample application: Apply for free samples through website form, email or phone, usually shipped within 3-5 working days; 5) FAE support: Contact our FAE engineers to obtain detailed technical documents and selection advice; 6) Technical seminars: Participate in our regularly held technical seminars to obtain documents and samples on site. We are committed to providing customers with convenient access channels to ensure you can quickly obtain the required technical support and product resources.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit our website or contact the sales team directly to obtain technical documents and samples. The FAE team can provide detailed technical consultation.
